title: Update color scheme to violet/black with pink background and yellow grids

requirements.summary: Update global CSS custom properties to violet/black/pink/yellow palette
acceptanceCriteria: Primary/accent CSS tokens are violet (e.g., oklch values in the violet range)
Grid background utility (defined in index.css) renders yellow grid lines
Black is used for text/foreground contrast tokens
All existing pages and components visually reflect the new palette without layout breakage

file_operations.description: Update all CSS custom properties in the :root and .dark selectors to implement the violet/black/pink/yellow color scheme. Set primary and accent tokens to violet OKLCH values, background to pink, foreground/text tokens to black for contrast, and grid background utilities to yellow. Ensure both light and dark theme variants reflect the new palette consistently.

requirements.summary: Update Tailwind config color tokens to align with violet/black/pink/yellow palette
acceptanceCriteria: Tailwind config color tokens for primary, background, accent, and grid reference the new violet/pink/yellow/black values
Year badges, nav links, and card components display the updated colors
No hardcoded color classes conflict with the new palette

file_operations.description: Update the theme.extend.colors section to reference the new violet, pink, yellow, and black CSS custom properties defined in index.css. Ensure that color tokens for primary, background, accent, foreground, card, and other semantic colors align with the updated palette so that Tailwind utility classes (used in badges, cards, buttons, navigation) pick up the new theme automatically.

requirements.summary: Update SparkParticles component to use violet/pink/yellow color schemes
acceptanceCriteria: Floating pill particles use violet, pink, and yellow color variants
No warm brown or skin-tone colors remain in the particle animation

file_operations.description: Replace the existing warm brown/skin-tone color schemes in the floating pill particles with violet, pink, and yellow color variants. Update the background color and border color values in the particle elements to use the new palette while preserving the animation and layout logic.
